chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No. D- 95 of 2026 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No. 489/26. 2. For hearing of main case. 09.02.2026 Mr. Asad Aftab, Advocate for the Petitioner. Agha Shahid Majeed Khan, Advocate for Respondent. ---------- The Petitioner has impugned a Pre-suspension Notice, through which no definite action has yet been taken against him. Under such circumstances, we are of the view that the Petition has been filed prematurely as the Petitioner ought to respond and contest the matter before the competent authority. The Petition stands disposed of accordingly. Judge Judge Ayaz
